form.label: AI Governance - Tokenomics
form.description: Adoption, token, spend, and spend-limit reporting from provider analytics feeds. Index scope comes from the ai_governance_index macro.

search.query: `ai_governance_index` | stats count by ai.vendor | rename ai.vendor AS vendor | fields vendor
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="summary" ai.vendor="$provider$" | sort - _time | head 1 | rename ai.adoption.daily_active_users AS daily_active_users | fields daily_active_users
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="summary" ai.vendor="$provider$" | sort - _time | head 1 | rename ai.adoption.daily_rate AS daily_adoption_rate | fields daily_adoption_rate
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="cost" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.cost.amount_usd AS cost_usd | stats sum(cost_usd) AS total_spend | eval total_spend=round(total_spend,2)
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="usage" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.usage.output_tokens AS out_tokens | stats sum(out_tokens) AS output_tokens
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="spend_limit" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.cost.utilization_pct AS utilization_pct | where utilization_pct>=80 | stats count

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="summary" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.adoption.daily_active_users AS daily_users, ai.adoption.weekly_active_users AS weekly_users | timechart avg(daily_users) AS dau avg(weekly_users) AS wau

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="summary" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.adoption.daily_rate AS daily_rate, ai.adoption.monthly_rate AS monthly_rate | timechart avg(daily_rate) AS daily avg(monthly_rate) AS monthly

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="usage" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename raw.product AS product, ai.usage.total_tokens AS tokens | stats sum(tokens) AS total_tokens by product | fields product, total_tokens
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="cost" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename raw.product AS product, ai.cost.amount_usd AS cost_usd | stats sum(cost_usd) AS spend_usd by product | sort - spend_usd
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="cost" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.cost.amount_usd AS cost_usd | timechart sum(cost_usd) AS spend_usd

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="usage" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.usage.output_tokens AS out_tokens, ai.usage.input_tokens AS in_tokens | timechart sum(out_tokens) AS output_tokens sum(in_tokens) AS input_tokens
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="user_cost" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS user, ai.cost.amount_usd AS cost | stats sum(cost) AS cost_usd by user | sort - cost_usd | head 15

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="user_usage" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS email, ai.usage.output_tokens AS out_tokens, ai.usage.input_tokens AS in_tokens | stats sum(out_tokens) AS output_tokens sum(in_tokens) AS input_tokens by email | fillnull value=0 output_tokens input_tokens | eval total_tokens=output_tokens+input_tokens | sort - total_tokens | head 15 | table email, output_tokens, input_tokens, total_tokens

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="spend_limit" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS email, ai.cost.limit_usd AS limit_usd, ai.cost.spend_usd AS spend_usd, ai.cost.utilization_pct AS utilization_pct, raw.source.type AS limit_source, raw.period AS period | where utilization_pct>=80 | table email, limit_usd, spend_usd, utilization_pct, limit_source, period | sort - utilization_pct

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="spend_limit" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS email, ai.cost.limit_usd AS limit_usd, ai.cost.spend_usd AS spend_usd, ai.cost.utilization_pct AS utilization_pct, raw.source.type AS limit_source, raw.period AS period | table email, limit_usd, spend_usd, utilization_pct, limit_source, period | sort - spend_usd | head 25

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="spend_limit_request" raw.status="pending" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS email, raw.status AS status, ai.cost.requested_limit_usd AS requested_limit_usd, ai.cost.spend_usd AS period_spend_usd, raw.id AS request_id | table _time, email, status, requested_limit_usd, period_spend_usd, request_id | sort - _time
